message:
bd-ml2r.9.2: add centrality tier infrastructure for semantic styling

- Add CentralityTier enum (High/Medium/Low) with CSS class suffix method
- Add NodeCentrality struct to hold per-node centrality data
- Add node_centrality field to LayoutExtensions for render access
- Add classify_centrality_tiers function to convert scores to tiers
- Handle edge cases: empty graphs and small graphs (< 5 nodes)
- Add 3 tests for tier classification covering edge cases

This provides the data infrastructure for centrality-based semantic
styling in SVG output. The renderer can use node_centrality to add
CSS classes like fm-node-centrality-high.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
